heading: Sapphiretown vs Schell Well — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sapphiretown, South Australia and Schell Well, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Schell Well has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Sapphiretown (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sapphiretown or Schell Well safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sapphiretown has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Schell Well scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sapphiretown scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Schell Well scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sapphiretown or Schell Well?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Schell Well has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
